sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value DECIMAL(10,2), other_value DECIMAL(10,2), created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, other_value, created_at) VALUES (1, 5.00, NULL, '2023-01-01 10:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, other_value, created_at) VALUES (2, NULL, 3.50, '2023-01-02 10:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, other_value, created_at) VALUES (3, -2.00, 7.50, '2023-01-03 10:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, other_value, created_at) VALUES (4, 0.00, 0.00, '2023-01-04 10:00:00');
SELECT id, sum(value) AS total_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING sum(value) >= 0;
SELECT id, (SELECT sum(value) FROM test_table WHERE value >= 1) AS total_positive_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, value, CASE WHEN sum(other_value) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE sum(other_value) END AS total_other_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value >= (SELECT sum(other_value) FROM test_table WHERE other_value IS NOT NULL) * 0.5;
SELECT id, value, sum(value) OVER (PARTITION BY created_at) AS sum_by_date FROM test_table WHERE value >= 0 ORDER BY sum_by_date DESC;
SELECT value, sum(cast(value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_decimal_value FROM test_table WHERE created_at >= '2023-01-01' GROUP BY value HAVING sum(cast(value AS DECIMAL)) >= 0;
SELECT id, value, (CASE WHEN other_value IS NOT NULL THEN sum(value) ELSE 0 END) AS conditional_sum FROM test_table GROUP BY id, value HAVING conditional_sum >= 2;
SELECT a.id, sum(a.value) FROM test_table a JOIN test_table b ON a.id >= b.id GROUP BY a.id HAVING sum(a.value) >= 0;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN new_column VARCHAR(255);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, other_value, created_at, new_column) VALUES (5, 2.00, 4.00, '2023-01-05 10:00:00', 'Edge Case');
SELECT id, new_column, sum(value) FROM test_table WHERE new_column = 'Edge Case' GROUP BY id, new_column HAVING sum(value) >= 0;
